sections.location: Smoke detectors are located in the upstairs and downstairs hallways.
The water heater is located in the mini hall closet downstairs.
The circuit breaker is located in the laundry room.
The water shut off is usually located near the road in front of your house. It typically looks like this.
This home has a split A/C system.
The electric meter is typically located on the exterior of your house.
There is a security system in the main floor closet.
The thermostat is located on the main floor on the wall.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
